description_long: This object is a compact, upright hand truck or dolly, commonly used for transporting heavy loads in urban and industrial environments. It features a sturdy black metal frame with three horizontal support bars and two large, solid wheels for stability and mobility. The handle is ergonomically curved and appears to be covered in a tan or beige material for improved grip. The base plate is wide and flat, designed to slide under objects for easy lifting. The wheels are robust and made of a dense material, likely rubber or hard plastic, suitable for rolling over various surfaces. The overall construction is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and ease of use for manual material handling.
description: A sturdy black hand truck with a wide base plate, two large wheels, and a tan handle grip, designed for transporting heavy loads.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide base plate, three horizontal support bars, and both wheels clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the base plate, the thickness of the frame, and the profile of one wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical frame, both wheels, and the handle's attachment points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same structural features as view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_fork_arms: There are no traditional fork arms; instead, a single wide, flat base plate extends forward at the bottom, made of thick metal and designed for sliding under loads.
attribute_overhead_guard: No overhead guard is present; the structure consists only of the vertical frame and handle.
attribute_mast: No mast is present; the vertical frame is a simple, rigid structure with three horizontal support bars.
attribute_operator_seat: No operator seat is present; the object is designed for manual operation while standing.
attribute_warning_lights: No warning lights are visible on any part of the object.
